package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for error_code_literals_duplicated_across_handlers: Repeated string error codes without a centralized catalog.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule030NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule030NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule030NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario030Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule030NegativeService, input Rule030NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
